items.titolo: I tested GPT-5.2 and the AI model's mixed results raise tough questions
items.descrizione: Subjected to my battery of 10 text tests and 4 image challenges, OpenAI's latest model barely edged out GPT-5.1. What are Plus subscribers actually paying for?

items.titolo: Your earbuds can translate 70 languages in real-time now, thanks to Gemini
items.descrizione: Android users can hear live translations in more than 70 languages, with Gemini preserving the speaker's tone and cadence.

items.titolo: Octopus ha l’offerta giusta per risparmiare su luce e gas nell’inverno 2026
items.descrizione: Le nuove tariffe dell'offerta a prezzo fisso del fornitore energetico britannico con il costo della materia prima bloccato per un anno. The post Octopus ha l’offerta giusta per risparmiare su luce e gas nell’inverno…

items.titolo: Nvidia decries 'far-fetched' reports of smuggling in face of DeepSeek training reports — unnamed sources claim Chinese company is involved in Blackwell smuggling ring
items.descrizione: DeepSeek is allegedly involved in a "phantom data center" smuggling scheme to get Blackwell GPU servers into China as part of training its newest LLM generation. While Nvidia refutes the claims as "farfetched", some…
